  "findings": [
    "Missing bonding jumper around the water meter, creating a potential break in the grounding electrode system path if the meter is removed."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an unspliced copper bonding jumper around the water meter using approved pipe clamps."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 250.104 requires metal water piping systems to be bonded. When a water meter is present, a bonding jumper must be installed around it to ensure electrical continuity of the grounding path even if the meter is removed for service or replacement.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.104",
    "NEC 250.53(D)(1)"
  ]
}
